stories.title: Knicks steal Game 1! Biggest takeaways and what we...
stories.summary: NBA insiders break down the biggest takeaways and what to watch for in Game 2 of this Finals showdown.

stories.title: Knicks stay hot, steal Game 1 behind Brunson's 30
stories.summary: The Knicks kept it rolling in Game 1 of the NBA Finals, getting 30 points from Jalen Brunson and erasing a 14-point second-half deficit to beat the Spurs 105-95 for their 12th straight playoff win.

stories.title: Fan storms court, attempts selfie next to Wemby
stories.summary: A fan ran onto the Frost Bank Center court during the fourth quarter of Wednesday night's NBA Finals and attempted to take a selfie next to Victor Wembanyama, halting play before the Knicks' 105-95 Game 1 victory.

stories.title: OSU OKs $100M deal to settle sexual-abuse cases
stories.summary: Ohio State has agreed to pay approximately $100 million to settle hundreds of legal claims from former student athletes who said they were sexually abused decades ago by a doctor at the university.

stories.title: QB Wilson announces retirement after 14 seasons
stories.summary: Ten-time Pro Bowl quarterback Russell Wilson confirmed Wednesday that he's retiring from the NFL to take a job with CBS Sports.
